creator: h.eichmann@gmx.de
text:
The download directory of the font has been changed. Thanks to Tom Gerald for 
the hint.

Fix: Please apply the attached patch.


Best regards,


Heiner





--Boundary-00=_JVXtJkOKk4/D45f
Content-Type: text/x-diff;
  charset="iso 8859-15";
  name="patch.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment;
	filename="patch.diff"



--Boundary-00=_JVXtJkOKk4/D45f----xP691ybvuEDy9YqvN1whB1Z8gDxupX0PA3OQrO1J4JBgsazg
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig	2009-03-09 20:51:07.000000000 +0100
+++ Makefile	2009-03-09 20:51:11.000000000 +0100
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@
 DISTVERSION=	0
 PORTREVISION=	2
 CATEGORIES=	x11-fonts
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.bryld.info/downloads/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.bryld.info/filer/
 DISTNAME=	manugot19
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.ttf
